summary: Comprehensive testing of Locofast v2.0 vendor approval workflow and fixed 500 errors. All 16 backend tests pass. Fixed missing @api_router.post decorator for POST /api/sellers endpoint. Frontend testing verified all features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/fabrics returns 200 OK with correct fabric data
GET /api/fabrics public endpoint filters out pending/rejected fabrics by default
GET /api/fabrics?include_pending=true returns ALL fabrics including pending ones
GET /api/fabrics?status=pending returns only pending fabrics
GET /api/fabrics/count returns correct count
GET /api/sellers returns 200 OK
GET /api/sellers?include_inactive=true returns 200 OK with all sellers
POST /api/auth/login - Admin login works (admin@locofast.com / admin123)
POST /api/vendor/login - Vendor login works (vendor@test.com / vendor123)
PUT /api/fabrics/{id} with {status: 'approved'} approves a fabric (admin auth required)
PUT /api/fabrics/{id} with {status: 'rejected'} rejects a fabric (admin auth required)
PUT /api/fabrics/{id} without auth returns 401/403 (security verified)
POST /api/vendor/fabrics creates fabric with status='pending'
POST /api/sellers creates a seller successfully (after fix)
Fabric response model includes status field
Fabric response has all required fields
Frontend: Public fabrics page at /fabrics loads with 192 fabric cards
Frontend: Vendor login at /vendor/login works and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Admin login at /admin/login works and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Admin fabrics page shows status filter dropdown
Frontend: Admin fabrics page shows status badges (Live, Pending, Draft)
Frontend: Admin fabrics page shows approve/reject buttons for pending fabrics
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Missing @api_router.post('/sellers') decorator in server.py line 559 - POST /api/sellers was returning 405 Method Not Allowed
normalize_fabric() function properly handles legacy 'tags' field (string to list conversion) - line 671-677
normalize_fabric() function properly handles 'status' field for legacy fabrics - line 741-743
GET /api/sellers has defensive defaults for missing fields like 'created_at' - lines 506-517
Vendor fabric creation correctly sets status='pending' - vendor_router.py line 212
Admin fabrics page correctly uses include_pending: true to load all fabrics - AdminFabrics.js line 242
seed_data_creation: Test fabrics and sellers created during testing were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All vendor approval workflow features tested and working. Fixed missing POST /api/sellers decorator. Two separate JWT auth systems: admin (/api/auth/login) and vendor (/api/vendor/login). Status field values: 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected', or null/undefined for legacy fabrics.

fixed_500_errors.GET_api_fabrics: Fixed - Pydantic validation failures on legacy docs (tags as string instead of list)
fixed_500_errors.GET_api_sellers: Fixed - Missing created_at field on test vendor record

vendor_approval_workflow.public_filtering: GET /api/fabrics filters out pending/rejected by default

frontend_ui.admin_fabrics_page: Status filter dropdown, status badges, approve/reject buttons

bug_fixed.root_cause: Missing @api_router.post('/sellers', response_model=Seller) decorator before create_seller function
